description: Aggregate opportunity amounts grouped by stage for pipeline visualization.
purpose: Provides total deal value and count at each pipeline stage for sales dashboards.
fromSql: SELECT tcrm_op_stage AS stage, COUNT(*) AS deal_count, COALESCE(SUM(tcrm_op_amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM mt_tcrm_opportunity WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} GROUP BY tcrm_op_stage ORDER BY CASE tcrm_op_stage WHEN 'prospecting' THEN 1 WHEN 'proposal' THEN 2 WHEN 'negotiation' THEN 3 WHEN 'closed_won' THEN 4 WHEN 'closed_lost' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

description: Lead counts grouped by status for conversion funnel analysis.
purpose: Shows how many leads are at each stage of the qualification funnel.
fromSql: SELECT tcrm_ld_status AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mt_tcrm_lead WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} GROUP BY tcrm_ld_status ORDER BY CASE tcrm_ld_status WHEN 'new' THEN 1 WHEN 'contacted' THEN 2 WHEN 'qualified' THEN 3 WHEN 'lost' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

description: List customer accounts with their key fields (name, industry, phone, status, code).
purpose: Returns customer accounts so the assistant can count, search and report on customers. Use this to answer 'how many customers' or 'list customers'.
fromSql: SELECT crm_acc_name, crm_acc_industry, crm_acc_phone, crm_acc_status, crm_acc_code FROM mt_crm_account WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 200
